project.name: 小说阅读器
project.styleDefinitionBrief: Novel reader app inspired by WeChat Read: warm muted tones (cream/beige background, dark green accent), clean sans-serif typography, minimal card-based bookshelf, immersive reading experience with generous whitespace
project.designRead: mobile app / novel reader / warm-muted-clean / showcase+task-driven / avoid dark-heavy-gaming aesthetics

colorSystem.primaryColorRole: #2E7D5B dark green for primary actions, tab selection, and accents
colorSystem.brandHuePolicy: single green hue; warm neutrals for backgrounds

styleContinuityAnchors.typographySystem: system sans-serif stack: PingFang SC, Helvetica Neue, Microsoft YaHei
styleContinuityAnchors.spacingSystem: 4px base: xs 4, sm 8, md 12, lg 16, xl 24, xxl 32
styleContinuityAnchors.componentLanguage: card-based list items, grouped settings rows, bottom sheet panels
styleContinuityAnchors.surfaceAndDepth: cards use 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.08); floating panels use deeper shadow
styleContinuityAnchors.imageryAndIconography: linear icons 1.5px stroke, book cover placeholders

sharedProjectShellContract.navigationShell: bottom tab bar with 2 tabs: 书架(active green), 功能(gray). White bg, top border #EDEDED, 49px height, 24x24 icons, 10px labels
sharedProjectShellContract.typographySystem: PingFang SC stack; display 20px, h1 17px, h2 15px, body 14px, caption 12px
sharedProjectShellContract.radiusScale: sm 4px btns/tags, md 8px cards/inputs, lg 12px panels/modals
sharedProjectShellContract.surfaceDepthModel: static card shadow alpha 0.08; floating layer shadow alpha up to 0.12
sharedProjectShellContract.alignmentRules: left-aligned content; centered tab bar; 16px page margins

pages.title: 书架
pages.visualNorthStar: Clean 3-column book grid with cream-white background, each card showing cover + title + reading progress

pages.title: 功能
pages.visualNorthStar: Grouped list settings page with white card groups on gray background, clear icon+text rows

pages.title: 阅读页
pages.visualNorthStar: Immersive full-screen reading with warm beige background, generous margins, 18px serif-like body text, chapter title, bottom nav bar

pages.title: 阅读页-菜单呼出
pages.visualNorthStar: Reader page with dimmed background showing top navigation bar and bottom toolbar with 4 icon buttons (目录/书签/夜间/设置)

pages.title: 阅读设置面板
pages.visualNorthStar: Bottom sheet panel with reading settings: font size slider, line spacing slider, 5 theme color circles, font selector dropdown, reading mode radio

pages.title: 章节目录
pages.visualNorthStar: Right-side sliding panel showing chapter list with current chapter highlighted by green left border, search box at top

pages.title: 搜索页
pages.visualNorthStar: Search page with input field at top, grouped search results by source, each result showing book title + author + latest chapter

pages.title: 书源管理
pages.visualNorthStar: Book source management page with source cards showing name, URL, enable/disable toggle, and失效 tag
